title: notifications-mail — background jobs
description: Three jobs. SendMailJob is the workhorse. ReconcileSuppressionsJob polls provider-side suppression lists. IngestMailProviderWebhookJob dispatched by the InboundWebhookReceived listener normalises provider payloads.

jobs.queue: resolved-at-dispatch — notifications-critical if priority=critical, else notifications
jobs.purpose: Sends a single Notification via Laravel Mail.
steps: Load Notification + resolve NotificationTemplate for (category, channel=mail, locale).

Check MailSuppressionRegistry::isSuppressed(email, workspace_id). If suppressed: create NotificationDelivery(state=permanently_failed, error_code=NOTIFICATIONS_MAIL_SUPPRESSED_ADDRESS). Fire NotificationFailed.
jobs.notes: Retries only on transient failures (provider 5xx, network timeout, rate limit). Hard failures set state=permanently_failed with no further attempts.

jobs.purpose: Normalises a provider-specific webhook payload into MailDelivered / Opened / Clicked / Bounced / Complaint events. Dispatched by the IngestMailProviderWebhookListener when webhook::InboundWebhookReceived fires with namespace=notifications-mail.
steps: Read webhook::InboundWebhookReceived event's { namespace, provider, headers, payload }.
Delegate to provider-specific normaliser (MailgunPayloadNormaliser / SendgridPayloadNormaliser / etc.) via NotificationsMailPayloadNormaliserRegistry.
Look up NotificationDelivery by (provider, provider_message_id) OR by header X-Academorix-Notification-Id when present.
If not found: log NOTIFICATIONS_MAIL_WEBHOOK_DELIVERY_NOT_FOUND, ack. Late-arriving webhook for a purged notification is not an error.
Dispatch the corresponding MailXxx event based on the normalised event type.
jobs.uniqueVia: (provider, provider_event_id) — provider-side event id when present, else webhook_receipt_id
jobs.notes: Idempotent: same (provider, provider_event_id) processed twice is a no-op.

jobs.purpose: Weekly reconciliation: pulls the provider-side suppression list (Mailgun / SES / SendGrid / Postmark provide APIs for this) + syncs any addresses we don't already have.
jobs.notes: Belt-and-braces for missed webhooks. Runs weekly Sunday 04 UTC via schedule.json.

inbound_receiver.flow: Provider webhook → webhook module's InboundWebhookController@ingest → signature-verified via strategy from notifications-mail's registry → fires webhook::InboundWebhookReceived → IngestMailProviderWebhookListener (this module) → IngestMailProviderWebhookJob.
